h1. Embedding and Vector Indexing

h2. Purpose

Generate embeddings for AI chunks and store them in a vector-searchable index.

h2. Recommended Initial Store

MongoDB Atlas Vector Search.

h2. In Scope

* Embedding model selection
* Embedding generation wrapper
* Vector index creation
* Metadata filter design
* Upsert handling
* Delete/deprecate handling
* Reindex by asset/entity type
* Search smoke tests

h2. Primary Requirements

|| ID || Requirement || Priority ||
| VEC-001 | Select embedding model | P0 |
| VEC-002 | Generate embeddings for chunks | P0 |
| VEC-003 | Store embeddings with chunk metadata | P0 |
| VEC-004 | Support deterministic upsert | P0 |
| VEC-005 | Support metadata-filtered vector search | P0 |
| VEC-006 | Support deprecate/delete handling | P1 |
| VEC-007 | Track embedding model version | P1 |
| VEC-008 | Support reindexing | P1 |

h2. Metadata Filters

* entity_type
* lifecycleStatus
* owner
* nodeId
* nodeType
* databaseType
* schema/store
* confidentiality
* PII/SPI flags
* source platform

h2. Success Criteria

* Semantic search returns relevant chunks for golden questions.
* Search results include source GUID/JRN.
* Deprecated assets are excluded by default.
* Re-running the embedding job does not create duplicates.
* Metadata filters work before LLM context assembly.

h2. Pitfalls / Risks

|| Risk || Impact || Mitigation ||
| Wrong embedding model or dimensions | Index rebuild required | Capture model and dimensions in ADR |
| Duplicate chunks | Search noise and increased cost | Use deterministic chunk IDs |
| Missing metadata filters | Security and relevance issues | Require filterable metadata in chunk schema |
| Deprecated records remain searchable | User trust issue | Implement deprecate/delete handling |
